TestCase z25Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_a = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code: ensure there is at least one element to operate on
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Operation: sort a random subarray in descending order
    int start = rand() % follow_case.n;
    int end   = rand() % follow_case.n;
    if (start > end) {
        int tmp = start;
        start = end;
        end = tmp;
    }
    // Simple selection sort (descending) on the chosen subarray [start, end]
    for (int i = start; i <= end; ++i) {
        for (int j = i + 1; j <= end; ++j) {
            if (follow_case.a[i] < follow_case.a[j]) {
                int tmp = follow_case.a[i];
                follow_case.a[i] = follow_case.a[j];
                follow_case.a[j] = tmp;
            }
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
